documents.name: Non-Disclosure Agreement
documents.description: A bilateral or unilateral agreement to protect confidential information shared between parties.

documents.name: Service Agreement
documents.description: A contract between a service provider and a client defining the scope, terms, and payment for services rendered.

documents.name: Employment Agreement
documents.description: A contract between an employer and employee outlining the terms and conditions of employment.

documents.name: Residential Lease Agreement
documents.description: A contract between a landlord and tenant defining the terms and conditions for renting residential property.

documents.name: Terms of Service
documents.description: A legal agreement between a service provider and users governing use of a website, app, or digital service.
